content.query:
CREATE VIEW     v_TradeAgreementMatrix
as
SELECT          FW.*
,               A.[Priority 3 - Customer]
,               C.[Priority 3 - Sales Territory]
,               B.[Priority 5 - Brand]
,               D.[Priority 5 - Sales Territory]
FROM
(
SELECT          TA.TAGN AS [Trade Agreement]
,               TA.TX40 as [Trade Agreeement Description]
,               TR.TREC as [Sales Rep ID]
,               CS.TX40 as [Sales Rep Name]
,               TR.RATE as [Commission Rate]
,               TA.STDE as [Start Date]
,               TA.LVDT as [End Date]
FROM            M3.OBTRAG TA
JOIN            M3.OBTREC TR on TA.TAGN = TR.TAGN
LEFT JOIN       M3.CSYTAB CS ON TR.TREC = CS.STKY 
WHERE           STCO = 'SMCD'
AND             TA.TATB = 'COML-01'
) FW

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT          TX.TAGN AS [Trade Agreement]
,               TX.OBV1 as [Priority 3 - Customer]
FROM            M3.OBTMTX TX
WHERE           PREX = 3
) A             on FW.[Trade Agreement] = A.[Trade Agreement]

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT          TX.TAGN AS [Trade Agreement]
,               TX.OBV2 as [Priority 5 - Brand]
FROM            M3.OBTMTX TX
WHERE           PREX = 5
) B             on FW.[Trade Agreement] = B.[Trade Agreement]

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT          SMD1 as [Sales Rep ID]
,               OBV1 as [Priority 3 - Sales Territory]
FROM            M3.CSMCDX
WHERE           PREX = 3
) C             on FW.[Sales Rep ID] = C.[Sales Rep ID] and A.[Priority 3 - Customer] is not null

LEFT JOIN

(
SELECT          SMD1 as [Sales Rep ID]
,               OBV1 as [Priority 5 - Sales Territory]
,               OBV2 as [Priority 5 - Brand]
FROM            M3.CSMCDX
WHERE           PREX = 4
) D             on FW.[Sales Rep ID] = D.[Sales Rep ID] and B.[Priority 5 - Brand] = D.[Priority 5 - Brand] and B.[Priority 5 - Brand] is not null








/*
select * from M3.CSMCDX
select * from M3.OBTREC
*/
